## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Manual validation, if applicable

## Risk Notes

- Detection changes and expected false-positive or false-negative tradeoffs
- Platform-specific behavior, if any

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include raw secrets, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable
